subjects.description: snowmobile rider speeding through a winter mountain road
subjects.appearance_details: bundled adult rider with insulated jacket, gloves, helmet, visor, and visible breath in the freezing air
subjects.relationship: primary rider controlling the snowmobile through the snowy landscape
subjects.location: center foreground on a winding snow-covered road
subjects.relative_size: medium human figure seated on a larger snowmobile, dominant in the frame
subjects.orientation: facing forward along the road with body leaned into each curve
subjects.pose: seated low with both hands gripping the handlebars and shoulders braced against speed
subjects.action: accelerates around icy bends while tracking the road ahead
subjects.state_changes: breath puffs appear and vanish; jacket and helmet gather drifting snow; body lean shifts with each turn
subjects.clothing: thick winter jacket, padded snow pants, gloves, boots, and full protective helmet
subjects.expression: determined and focused, mostly hidden by visor
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: mostly covered by winter gear, with only cold-air breath and small exposed areas visible
subjects.facial_features: helmet visor hides most features, head angle shows concentration

subjects.description: snowmobile cutting fresh tracks through snow
subjects.appearance_details: compact winter vehicle with black runners, textured seat, handlebars, front cowling, and churning rear tread
subjects.relationship: vehicle carrying the rider and creating motion through the scene
subjects.location: beneath the rider on the snowy road
subjects.relative_size: large vehicle in the foreground, smaller than the surrounding mountains
subjects.orientation: nose pointed down the curving road
subjects.pose: low, forward-moving stance with suspension absorbing uneven snow
subjects.action: speeds along the road and sprays powder from the rear tread
subjects.state_changes: fresh tracks stretch behind it; powder bursts at curves; engine vibration trembles through the body
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: glossy metal and plastic panels dusted with fine snow
subjects.facial_features: headlight and front cowling form the visible front profile

background_setting: A pristine white mountain landscape with a narrow winding snowy road, distant snow-capped peaks, icy curves, evergreen edges, and untouched powder beyond the track.

lighting.conditions: Bright cold daylight reflecting off snow, crisp blue shadows, sunlit peaks, and sparkling ice highlights.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright cold daylight reflecting off snow, crisp blue shadows, sunlit peaks, and sparkling ice highlights.

aesthetics.composition: Adrenaline-driven winter realism with clean snow textures, visible speed, powder spray, and sweeping alpine scale.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Adrenaline-driven winter realism with clean snow textures, visible speed, powder spray, and sweeping alpine scale.

cinematography.camera_motion: Rider-perspective action shot from low front-side tracking, slight vibration, wide 16:9 framing, and fast but readable motion around curves.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Cinematic outdoor adventure with crisp detail, high contrast snow, and dynamic mountain motion.
context: A winter rider takes a thrilling snowmobile run through a remote mountain road while the landscape rushes past.

actions.description: The rider enters a curving snowy road as the snowmobile engine surges and powder begins to trail behind.
The snowmobile leans through icy bends, carving fresh tracks while distant peaks flash through the frame.
The rider straightens out, breath steaming in the cold as the vehicle races deeper into the white landscape.

segments.description: Establish the rider, snowmobile, and winding mountain road from a fast low tracking angle.
segments.key_changes: engine acceleration begins; powder spray starts; fresh tracks appear
segments.camera: low front-side tracking shot with slight vibration

segments.description: Follow the snowmobile through the main icy curves with mountains filling the horizon.
segments.key_changes: rider leans into turns; snow plume widens; peaks pass in the background
segments.camera: dynamic rider-perspective tracking with controlled motion blur

segments.description: The vehicle exits the curve and speeds forward into open snow.
segments.key_changes: road straightens; breath plume is visible; tracks extend behind
segments.camera: steady forward chase view with wide alpine framing

temporal_caption: A bundled snowmobile rider races along a winding snowy mountain road, carving fresh tracks through bright winter powder.
audio_description: Roaring snowmobile engine, treads grinding through snow, wind rush, powder spray, and faint cold mountain ambience.
